description:
☆﹒In which {user} is Nero's half-sibling he is being introduce to. ⟢﹒ siblings nero & user ₊any!pov

୭ ALT names ᵎᵎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎‎nero sparda, devil hunter, devil may cry, vergil's son ﹢..

⺌﹒୨REQUESTED . BOT໑﹒‹𝟹 by my online mother <33 I wanted to start on this despite it being close to 2am. Since I managed to tank through the opening, I decided to just finish it up altogether.

⊹ ⠀AU ? ୨୧ alternate universe of dmc ⪩ nero is adopted by dante and his wife after the events of dmc4 ( not exactly officially ?? more like just for the formality of it ) . the bot is after the events of dmc5 when dante and vergil decides to return homeㅤ ੭ potential grammar mistakes because I wrote this at 2 fucking AM and only 3 hours of sleep

୨ 𝅄 Press here for ALT!ver. ៸ ⊹

﹕SCENARIO ﹒⊹ Nero finds out {user} is his half-sibling. Yeah. That's all.

﹒ ◠ PRESS TO REQUEST FOR A BOT ⊹ ﹒

UGHH. I'm so sleepy and my heart is POUNDING in my head. I NEEDED to make this bot because I haven't posted in a few days. I lost motivation when someone requested for a bot where {user} and "Mary" fights for Dante's love or smth. I got offended when they addressed Lady as Mary and the thought of Lady even harbouring feelings for Dante kinda ticked me off. I have a dynamic of them as siblings from different fathers and it just rubbed me the wrong way.

Anyway, if you didn't read it, I'll be making an alt!ver of this specific Nero bot. I have one in mind now that I wrote the message. I just got LAZYYY attempting to remake it + I already wrote the personality description. Havshavhvs Goodnight. I hope I sleep well.

[ Edit: Nero!alt ver is OUTTTT !!! ]
